description: Configuration list of strategic content sources, designed to automate crawling and scraping using the Firecrawl API for all portals.

sources.name: HST - Hygiène et Sécurité du Travail
Préventica - Innovation & Salons Santé au Travail
Sika Finance - Sonatel Reports
sources.scraping_rule: Scrape fundamental analysis, balance sheets, dividends, and financial statements of listed companies.

sources.name: Investopedia - DCF Valuation
sources.scraping_rule: Extract equity research guides, discounted cash flow (DCF) models, and intrinsic value calculation formulas.

sources.name: Sika Finance - BCEAO Decisions
sources.scraping_rule: Monitor BRVM stock market index, central bank interest rate decisions (BCEAO), and macroeconomic indicators in the UEMOA region.

sources.name: Sika Finance - DCA Strategies
sources.scraping_rule: Monitor publications on behavioral finance, dollar-cost averaging (DCA), and investor sentiment models.

sources.name: The Lean Startup - Eric Ries
sources.scraping_rule: Extract articles, diagrams, and case studies about Lean Startup iteration cycle, MVP validation, and product-market fit.

sources.name: Blue Ocean Strategy Hub
sources.scraping_rule: Extract case studies, value curves, and strategic canvases on market creation and Blue Ocean models.

sources.name: Netflix Jobs - Culture Hub
sources.scraping_rule: Scrape HR frameworks, high-performance culture manifestos, freedom & responsibility, and employee empowerment practices.

sources.name: History - Industrial Revolutions
sources.scraping_rule: Extract lessons, historical timelines, and societal disruptions from past industrial revolutions applied to the AI age.

sources.name: McKinsey Digital Insights - Generative AI
sources.scraping_rule: Monitor reports on the economic impact of Generative AI, automation indexes, and organizational transformation models.

ia-informer.label: S'informer (Actualité)
ia-informer.description: TLDR AI, ActuIA, et les actualités directes des laboratoires d'IA.

sources.name: TLDR AI
sources.scraping_rule: Scrape the daily AI newsletter for recent news summaries, tool launches, and open-source updates.

sources.name: ActuIA
sources.scraping_rule: Extract French daily news, French research breakthroughs, and AI policy announcements.

sources.name: Anthropic News (RSS)
sources.scraping_rule: Scrape Anthropic research, Claude model updates, and safety papers via their news feed.

sources.name: OpenAI Blog (RSS)
sources.scraping_rule: Scrape OpenAI reasoning model releases, APIs, benchmarks, and safety guidelines.

sources.name: Google DeepMind Blog (RSS)
sources.scraping_rule: Scrape Gemini and AlphaFold announcements, science-focused research papers.

sources.name: Mistral AI News (RSS)
sources.scraping_rule: Scrape sovereign open-weights LLMs, benchmarks, and European AI compliance statements.

sources.name: Hugging Face Papers (RSS)
sources.scraping_rule: Extract daily trending ML research papers, model weights releases, and community ratings.

ia-comprendre.label: Comprendre (Analyse)
ia-comprendre.description: Signaux faibles, critiques de fond, et communautés techniques.

sources.name: Import AI (Substack)
sources.scraping_rule: Extract weekly analysis of global AI geopolitics, compute trends, and hardware efficiency parameters.

sources.name: Hacker News (YCombinator)
sources.scraping_rule: Filter and scrape top AI/ML discussions, developer reviews of new models, and technical releases.

sources.name: Reddit r/LocalLLaMA
sources.scraping_rule: Scrape trending local model benchmarks (Ollama, llama.cpp), fine-tuning tips, and GGUF quantization parameters.

sources.name: Reddit r/singularity
sources.scraping_rule: Monitor global breakthroughs, AGI predictions, and raw discussions about computational acceleration.

ia-pratiquer.label: Pratiquer (YouTube)
ia-pratiquer.description: Apprendre à faire : automatisation, no-code, implémentations techniques et architecture LLM.

sources.name: Baptiste Simard (YouTube)
sources.scraping_rule: Extract tutorials on business workflows automation, French SaaS building, and custom database integrations.

sources.name: Shubham Sharma (YouTube)
sources.scraping_rule: Extract tutorials on no-code tools (Make.com, Glide, Airtable) and practical AI tool configurations.

sources.name: Nate Herk (YouTube)
sources.scraping_rule: Extract step-by-step guides on building multi-agent systems with n8n, LangChain, and API-based automations.

sources.name: Liam Ottley (YouTube)
sources.scraping_rule: Extract video tutorials on selling and deploying custom AI automation agency (AAA) solutions for enterprise clients.

sources.name: Matthew Berman (YouTube)
sources.scraping_rule: Extract video testing of new open-source models, installation tutorials, and comparing local LLMs.

sources.name: Andrej Karpathy (YouTube)
sources.scraping_rule: Extract deep scientific courses explaining LLM training from scratch, tokenization, neural network architectures, and PyTorch coding.
